====''Pokémon the Series: Diamond and Pearl''====
Aaron was briefly mentioned by fellow [[Elite Four]] member [[Lucian]] in ''[[DP035|An Elite Meet and Greet!]]''. He then debuted in ''[[DP099|A Trainer and Child Reunion!]]'', where he was shown to be preparing for his championship {{pkmn|battle}} against {{an|Cynthia}}. He was conducting a public {{pkmn|training}} session at a small town between [[Hearthome City]] and [[Solaceon Town]], which had been advertised in an issue of the {{DL|Magazines in the Pokémon world|Poké Chic}} magazine that featured him on the cover.

{{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} decided to go watch Aaron train and joined the long line of fans that were there to meet him, with {{an|Dawn}} getting her copy of Poké Chic signed by him. When Aaron found out that the group knew Cynthia personally, he invited them to his training center. There, he revealed that a {{p|Wurmple}} was his [[List of characters' first Pokémon|first Pokémon]] and close friend when he was young, but due to his anger at it for losing a match, he abandoned it. He regretted it later, and from then on, he tried his best to train hard and to understand {{type|Bug}} {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} so that the same incident would not happen again. Aaron eventually encountered Wurmple again as a {{TP|Aaron|Beautifly}} by the end of the episode, following a battle against {{TRT}}.

Aaron reappeared in [[DP100|the next episode]], where he was seen on [[television]] having his battle with Cynthia at the {{DL|Pokémon League|Champion League}}, but he lost.
